title: Improve trusted local workflow reliability
summary: Add structured controller actions for safer local edit, verify, commit, handoff, and campaign state handling.
goals: Add chunked direct-edit patch application with fresh file fingerprints and actionable failure reports.
Add selected-path Git helper actions for diff, stage, commit, and commit SHA reporting.
Add handoff artifact output when final repository updates cannot complete.
Improve edit-session lineage and verification metadata.
Harden campaign no-change and cleanup transitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Selected-path commits do not include unrelated dirty files.
Patch failures are recoverable and explain what failed.
Blocked finalization produces a handoff artifact.
Edit sessions and campaign summaries show changes, checks, and blockers.

tasks.title: Inspect current workflow code
tasks.objective: Find source files and tests for direct-edit, Git, handoff, and campaign transitions.
notes: Execution blocked before source inspection: run_agent_goal experienced WORKER_LOST and was cancelled; dispatch_task/submit_local_job/read_repository_file/get_local_job_output/list_checks were blocked by the platform layer. This is direct evidence for the structured local workflow reliability goal.
